subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 01 (Tablet to the first Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Lauded and glorified is He Who is the sovereign Lord of the kingdoms of heaven and earth and whatever is between them.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله العزیز المحبوب. سبحان الذی له ملک السموات و الأرض و ما بینهما قل کل الیه راجعون هو الذی یهدی من یشآء
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @preexistence of the Manifestation of God

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
